steps.title: Substitute the given input
steps.content: The function is $f(x)=-3x+60$, and the input is $x=-8$. Substitute carefully: $$f(-8)=-3(-8)+60.$$

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice D is correct. Choice A adds $-3$ and $-8$ before adding $60$. Choice B ignores the coefficient $-3$. Choice C uses $-3+60$ instead of substituting $-8$ for $x$.
